# A Plus Scaffolding

> Residential and construction scaffolding across the NSW South Coast, from Eden to Ulladulla. On time. Safe. Done right — so your site keeps moving.

## About
A Plus Scaffolding is a scaffolding company based in Moruya, NSW, Australia. We supply and install scaffolding for residential renovations and larger construction sites, with a focus on tidy setups, clear access, reliable scheduling, and safe, compliant work.

## Services
- Residential scaffolding (renovations, painting, roofing, home projects)
- Construction scaffolding (multi-level and staged site scaffolding for builders and developers)
- Roof access (for roofers, painters, solar installers, renderers)
- Install, adjustment and dismantle

## Safety & compliance
- Safe Work Method Statements (SWMS) provided as required
- On-site toolbox meetings before work begins
- Handover certificate issued on completion of every install

## Service area
NSW South Coast, Eden to Ulladulla. Towns covered include Moruya, Batemans Bay, Narooma, Malua Bay, Tuross Head, Broulee, Tomakin, Nelligen, Ulladulla, Nowra, Bega, Merimbula and Eden.

## Contact
- Phone: +61 433 676 716
- Email: junior@aplusscaffolding.com.au
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 6:00am–5:00pm

- Website: https://aplusscaffolding.com.au/

## Core message
On time. Safe. Done right — so your site keeps moving. Call +61 433 676 716 for a fast quote; we respond within 1 business day.
